---
title: ""
author: "Mark Zhang"
date: last-modified
format:
  pdf:
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    number-sections: true
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---


```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf

# -----------------------------
# 1. Load and clean
# -----------------------------
df_shots = pd.read_csv("../data/mxd_shots.csv", dtype={60: str, 64: str}).copy()
df_shots.columns = df_shots.columns.str.lower()

# keep only complete ends
df_shots = df_shots[
    df_shots.groupby(["id", "game", "end"])["shot"].transform("nunique") == 11
].copy()

# ids
df_shots["match_id"] = df_shots["id"].astype(str) + "_" + df_shots["game"].astype(str)
df_shots["match_end_id"] = (
    df_shots["id"].astype(str) + "_"
    + df_shots["game"].astype(str) + "_"
    + df_shots["end"].astype(str)
)

# hammer team
is_t1_hammer = df_shots["t1"].eq(df_shots["hammer_end"])
df_shots["hteam"] = np.where(is_t1_hammer, df_shots["t1"], df_shots["t2"])
df_shots["nhteam"] = np.where(is_t1_hammer, df_shots["t2"], df_shots["t1"])

# hammer / non-hammer scores
for phase in ["before", "during", "after"]:
    df_shots[f"h_{phase}"] = np.where(
        is_t1_hammer, df_shots[f"t1{phase}"], df_shots[f"t2{phase}"]
    )
    df_shots[f"nh_{phase}"] = np.where(
        is_t1_hammer, df_shots[f"t2{phase}"], df_shots[f"t1{phase}"]
    )
```

```{python}

ends = df_shots.drop_duplicates("match_end_id").copy()

# 2) end-level indicators (same as your definitions)
ends["HE"] = (ends["h_during"] >= 2).astype(int)     # hammer scores 2+
ends["FE"] = (ends["h_during"] <= 1).astype(int)     # non-hammer holds hammer to 0/1
ends["SE"] = (ends["nh_during"] >= 1).astype(int)    # non-hammer scores 1+

# 3) make team-end rows (2 rows per end: one for hammer team, one for non-hammer team)
hammer_rows = pd.DataFrame({
    "team": ends["hteam"],
    "HE": ends["HE"],          # defined when you HAVE hammer
    "FE": np.nan,
    "SE": np.nan,
})

nonhammer_rows = pd.DataFrame({
    "team": ends["nhteam"],
    "HE": np.nan,
    "FE": ends["FE"],          # defined when you DON'T have hammer
    "SE": ends["SE"],
})

team_end = pd.concat([hammer_rows, nonhammer_rows], ignore_index=True)

# 4) team-level rates (averages over eligible ends)
team_rates = team_end.groupby("team", as_index=False).agg(
    HE=("HE","mean"),
    FE=("FE","mean"),
    SE=("SE","mean"),
    n_HE=("HE","count"),
    n_FE=("FE","count"),
    n_SE=("SE","count"),
)

# 5) weighted average team strength
w_HE, w_FE, w_SE = 1/3, 1/3, 1/3
team_rates["strength"] = (
    w_HE * team_rates["HE"] +
    w_FE * team_rates["FE"] +
    w_SE * team_rates["SE"]
)

# 6) merge team-level strength back onto shot-level df_shots (optional)
# (this gives each shot row the strength of its hammer team and non-hammer team)
df_shots = df_shots.merge(team_rates[["team","strength"]], left_on="hteam", right_on="team", how="left") \
                   .rename(columns={"strength":"hteam_strength"}).drop(columns=["team"])

df_shots = df_shots.merge(team_rates[["team","strength"]], left_on="nhteam", right_on="team", how="left") \
                   .rename(columns={"strength":"nhteam_strength"}).drop(columns=["team"])

df_shots["strength_diff"] = df_shots["hteam_strength"] - df_shots["nhteam_strength"]

```
```{python}
# -----------------------------
# 2. End-level dataframe first
# -----------------------------
end_df = df_shots.drop_duplicates("match_end_id").copy()

end_df = end_df[
    [
        "match_id", "match_end_id", "id", "game", "end",
        "hteam", "nhteam",
        "powerplay", 'strength_diff',
        "h_before", "nh_before", "h_during", "nh_during", "h_after", "nh_after"
    ]
].copy()

# outcome and state variables
end_df["score_diff_before"] = end_df["h_before"] - end_df["nh_before"]
end_df["strength_diff_z"] = (end_df["strength_diff"] - end_df["strength_diff"].mean()) / end_df["strength_diff"].std()
```


```{python}
# multinomial outcome
end_df["outcome"] = np.select(
    [
        end_df["h_during"] >= 2,
        end_df["h_during"] == 1,
        ((end_df["h_during"] == 0) & (end_df["nh_during"] == 0)) | (end_df["nh_during"] >= 1)
    ],
    ["2+", "1", "0"],
    default=None
)

end_df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"]
)

end_df["score_diff_grp"] = np.select(
    [
        end_df["score_diff_before"] < 0,
        end_df["score_diff_before"] == 0,
        end_df["score_diff_before"] > 0
    ],
    [
        "trailing",
        "tied",
        "leading"
    ]
)

end_df["score_diff_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["score_diff_grp"],
    categories=["tied", "trailing", "leading"],  # tied as reference
    ordered=False
)

# final end bins
end_int = end_df["end"].astype(int)
end_df["end_grp"] = np.select(
    [end_int <= 4, end_int == 5, end_int.isin([6, 7]), end_int == 8],
    ["<=4", "5", "6-7", "8"],
    default=None
)
end_df = end_df.dropna(subset=["end_grp"]).copy()
```

```{python}
print(pd.crosstab(
    [end_df["end_grp"], end_df["score_diff_grp"]],
    end_df["powerplay"],
    normalize="index"
).round(3))
print(pd.crosstab(
    [end_df["end_grp"], end_df["score_diff_grp"]],
    end_df["powerplay"]
))
```

```{python}
end_df["score_diff_bin"] = pd.cut(
    end_df["score_diff_before"],
    bins=[-100, -2, -0.5, 0.5, 2, 100],
    labels=["trail_2plus", "trail_1", "tied", "lead_1", "lead_2plus"]
)

end_df["score_diff_bin"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["score_diff_bin"],
    categories=["tied", "trail_1", "trail_2plus", "lead_1", "lead_2plus"],
    ordered=False
)
print(pd.crosstab(end_df["score_diff_bin"], end_df["outcome"]))
print(pd.crosstab(end_df["score_diff_bin"], end_df["outcome"], normalize="index").round(3))
print(pd.crosstab(end_df["score_diff_bin"], end_df["powerplay"], normalize="index").round(3))
```


```{python}
end_int = end_df["end"].astype(int)
end_df["sel_end_grp"] = np.select(
    [end_int <= 5, end_int==6,end_int==7, end_int == 8],
    ["<=5", "6","7", "8"],
    default=None
)

end_df["sel_end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["sel_end_grp"],
    categories=["<=5", "6","7", "8"]
)
sel_result_int = smf.logit(
    """
    powerplay ~ C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
              * C(sel_end_grp, Treatment(reference='6'))
              
    """,
    data=end_df
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": end_df["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(sel_result_int.summary())
```

```{python}
end_df_late = end_df[end_df["end"].astype(int).isin([5, 6, 7, 8])].copy()
end_df_late["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df_late["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"]
)
end_int = end_df_late["end"].astype(int)
end_df_late["out_end_grp"] = np.select(
    [end_int == 5, end_int==6,end_int==7, end_int == 8],
    ["5", "6","7", "8"],
    default=None
)

end_df_late["out_end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df_late["out_end_grp"],
    categories=["5", "6","7", "8"]
)
```


```{python}
from patsy import dmatrix
import statsmodels.api as sm

X = dmatrix(
    """
    powerplay
    + C(out_end_grp, Treatment(reference='6'))
    + C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
    + powerplay:C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
    + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=end_df_late,
    return_type="dataframe"
)

y_codes = end_df_late["outcome"].cat.codes

model = sm.MNLogit(y_codes, X)
result = model.fit(
    method="newton",
    maxiter=200,
    disp=False,
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": end_df_late["match_id"]}
)

print(result.summary())
```

```{python}
end_df_late["scored_2plus"] = (end_df_late["nh_during"] >= 2).astype(int)


sens_result = smf.logit(
    """
    scored_2plus ~ powerplay
                 + C(out_end_grp, Treatment(reference='6'))
                 + C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + powerplay:C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=end_df_late
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": end_df_late["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(sens_result.summary())
```

```{python}
or_vals = np.exp(result.params)
or_ci = np.exp(result.conf_int())

print(or_vals)
print(or_ci)
```


```{python}
pred_scenarios_1 = pd.DataFrame([
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "sel_end_grp": "<=5"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "sel_end_grp": "6"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "sel_end_grp": "7"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "sel_end_grp": "8"},

    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "sel_end_grp": "<=5"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "sel_end_grp": "6"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "sel_end_grp": "7"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "sel_end_grp": "8"},

    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "sel_end_grp": "<=5"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "sel_end_grp": "6"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "sel_end_grp": "7"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "sel_end_grp": "8"},

    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "sel_end_grp": "<=5"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "sel_end_grp": "6"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "sel_end_grp": "7"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "sel_end_grp": "8"},

    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "sel_end_grp": "<=5"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "sel_end_grp": "6"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "sel_end_grp": "7"},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "sel_end_grp": "8"},
])

pred_scenarios_1["score_diff_bin"] = pd.Categorical(
    pred_scenarios_1["score_diff_bin"],
    categories=["tied", "trail_1", "trail_2plus", "lead_1", "lead_2plus"]
)

pred_scenarios_1["sel_end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    pred_scenarios_1["sel_end_grp"],
    categories=["<=5", "6", "7", "8"]
)

pred_scenarios_1["Pr_powerplay"] = sel_result_int.predict(pred_scenarios_1).round(3)

print(pred_scenarios_1)
```



```{python}
import pandas as pd
from patsy import dmatrix

mean_strength = end_df_late["strength_diff_z"].mean()

scenarios = pd.DataFrame([
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "tied",        "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},

    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_1",     "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},

    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "trail_2plus", "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},

    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_1",      "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},

    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "5", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "6", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "7", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 0, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
    {"score_diff_bin": "lead_2plus",  "out_end_grp": "8", "powerplay": 1, "strength_diff_z": mean_strength},
])

scenarios["score_diff_bin"] = pd.Categorical(
    scenarios["score_diff_bin"],
    categories=["tied", "trail_1", "trail_2plus", "lead_1", "lead_2plus"]
)

scenarios["out_end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    scenarios["out_end_grp"],
    categories=["5", "6", "7", "8"]
)

X_new = dmatrix(
    """
    powerplay
    + C(out_end_grp, Treatment(reference='6'))
    + C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
    + powerplay:C(score_diff_bin, Treatment(reference='tied'))
    + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=scenarios,
    return_type="dataframe"
)

pred = result.predict(X_new)

pred_table = pd.concat(
    [scenarios.reset_index(drop=True), pred.reset_index(drop=True)],
    axis=1
)

pred_table.columns = [
    "score_diff_bin", "out_end_grp", "powerplay", "strength_diff_z",
    "Pr_0", "Pr_1", "Pr_2plus"
]

pred_table[["Pr_0", "Pr_1", "Pr_2plus"]] = pred_table[["Pr_0", "Pr_1", "Pr_2plus"]].round(3)

print(pred_table)
```
